title: Where to Stay After Likabula Falls: A Tea Estate Retreat
meta_title: Where to Stay After Likabula Falls | Thyolo House
meta_description: Wondering where to stay after Likabula Falls? Thyolo House is 30 minutes away — boutique rooms, a pool, and Italian dining on a historic tea estate.
author: The Thyolo House
excerpt: After the hike to Likabula Falls, you deserve more than a basic guesthouse. Thyolo House sits 30 minutes away on a century-old tea estate, with a pool to cool off in, an Italian-fusion restaurant, and five boutique rooms surrounded by plantations and forest.
content:
